assessmentQuestionVersion.name: EM_Physician_ADMINISTRATIVE_AND_LEGAL V2
assessmentQuestionVersion.questionText:
ADMINISTRATIVE AND LEGAL – INCLUDING:
  • Familiar with guidelines regarding transfer of patients
  • Familiar with my obligation to abide by Hospital policy, and to coordinate with, and notify Hospital administration regarding any decision to divert a patient away from the ED
  • Familiar with protocols as it pertains to use of restraints
  • Proficient in basic computer skills required for completing electronic medical records order entry
  • Familiar with the requirements of EMTALA
  • Familiar with the requirements for medical screening examination for patients presenting to the ED, and my obligation to see all patients
